TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Poland hya' ga cyux maki' tay 52 00 N, 20 00 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 312,685 sq km (maki' tay 70ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 304,255 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 8,430 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 38,523,261. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 48.20%, lhlahuy hya' ga 30.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 21.20%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Warsaw. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 3 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Andrzej Duda, aring ryax 6 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: polan* ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a wars~…ēaw. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj jma…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a an*rzej *u*a, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Poland hya' ga cyux maki' tay 52 00 N, 20 00 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 312,685 sq km (maki' tay 70ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 304,255 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 8,430 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 38,523,261. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 48.20%, lhlahuy hya' ga 30.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 21.20%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Warsaw. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 3 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Andrzej Duda, aring ryax 6 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: polan* ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a wars~…ēaw. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj jma…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a an*rzej *u*a, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
